# Code of Conduct

## Our standard

We are committed to a respectful, inclusive, and constructive collaboration environment.

All participants are expected to:

- communicate respectfully
- assume good intent
- provide actionable technical feedback
- avoid personal attacks and harassment

## Scope

This code of conduct applies to repository discussions, issues, pull requests, and related collaboration spaces.

## Reporting

Report unacceptable behavior through dots-ai internal channels to the Technology leadership team.
